tapo_no_rtsp: Tapo camera has no RTSP. Enable Camera Account in the Tapo app (Settings → Advanced → Camera Account) and set rtsp_username/rtsp_password in the integration.
no_snapshot: Camera does not expose a snapshot.
tapo_snapshot_failed: Tapo snapshot unavailable. RTSP uses Camera Account (Tapo app → camera Settings → Advanced → Camera Account), not necessarily the cloud account. Detail: {error}
image_no_url: Image entity does not expose an image.
no_stream: Camera does not expose an MJPEG or RTSP stream.
no_webm_live: Camera does not support WebM live playback.
no_rtsp_for_webm: Camera does not expose an RTSP stream for WebM playback.
reolink_channel_missing: Reolink channel is missing from attributes.
audio_not_supported: Audio settings are not supported for this camera.
tapo_talk_not_available: Direct Tapo talk-back is not available yet. Use Frigate+go2rtc with an ONVIF source or the Tapo app.
reolink_talk_not_available: Reolink talk-back requires go2rtc with an ONVIF source in the stream or the reolink_talk integration.
audio_play_not_supported: Camera does not support speaker playback.
mammotion_not_webrtc: Camera is not a Mammotion WebRTC stream.
mammotion_no_video: Robot is not sending video — start the camera in the Mammotion app, then try again
mammotion_uid_conflict: Camera already in use (close the Mammotion app or other Hyve windows with live), then press play again.
mammotion_viewer_busy: Live view is already open in another card — close it first.
mammotion_agora_load_failed: Could not load Agora SDK (check your connection)
access_denied: You do not have access to this camera.
